creator: freebsd-bugzilla@in-addr.com
text:
If you select the DANE option on FreeBSD 9.3 and do not have OpenSSL from ports installed the build will fail as DANE requires an OpenSSL version greater than 1.0.0

From the build output:

cc dane.c
In file included from dane.c:44:
dane-openssl.c:15:3: error: #error "OpenSSL 1.0.0 or higher required"
